equivalents_en: of (referring to a person or people)

senses.definition_en: of (referring to a person or people)
senses.definition_dg: Neno rinahumirwa kuonyesa atu ni a yupi ama ni a phatu gani.

examples.dg: Ana a Bakari akaphiya sukuli.
examples.en: Bakari's children went to school.
examples.sw: Watoto wa Bakari walienda shule.

senses.definition_en: he or she is, they are, he or she was, they were
senses.definition_dg: Neno rinaonyesa kukala mutu a hipho ama kala a hipho.

examples.dg: Baba a kaya, kadzangbwephiya.
examples.en: Father is at home, he hasn't gone yet.
examples.sw: Baba yuko nyumbani, hajaenda bado.

examples.dg: A'a, kadzangbwephiya
examples.en: Has Hamisi already gone to Mombasa?

senses.definition_dg: Mutu anayephiya na gari, meli, ama ndege ela si ye ndiye anayeendesha.

examples.dg: Barabara ya Kwale kuphiya Mombasa ina abiriya anji
examples.en: There are many passengers on the road from Kwale to Mombasa
examples.sw: Kulikuwa na abiria wengi garini kutoka Kwale kwenda Mombasa.

senses.definition_dg: Kumuogopha na kumuabudu Mlungu ama chitu unachokiamini, kpwa kuswali ama kpwa njira zanjina.

examples.dg: Atu a kare kala nkuabudu kpwa njira nyinji.
examples.en: People in the old days used to worship in many ways.
examples.sw: Watu wa zamani walikuwa wanaabudu kwa njia nyingi.

senses.definition_en: mind, intellect, understanding, reason, sense, intelligence, judgment
senses.definition_dg: Uwezo wa mutu wa kufikiri, kuelewa na kuamula mambo.

examples.dg: Lunga achilizo uchilonda kuhenda uamuzi.
examples.en: Use your mind when you want to make a decision.
examples.sw: Tumia akili yako unapotaka kufanya uamuzi.

senses.definition_dg: Uwezo wa kuhenda vitu vinono kpwa busara.

examples.dg: Fundi wahumira achili nyinji kudzenga nyumba hino
examples.en: The builder used much ability to build this house
examples.sw: Fundi alitumia akili nyingi kujenga nyumba hii.

senses.definition_dg: Njira ya kuhega mutu kpwa werevu.

examples.dg: Usihege atu achili, kpwa mana gandakumanya.
examples.en: Don't trick people, because they will find out.
examples.sw: Usiwatege watu kwa sababu watakujua.

sub_entries.definition_en: to trick someone, to trip someone up (mentally)

senses.definition_dg: Njira nono ya kugomba na kuhendana na atu anjina.

examples.dg: Mwana iye ana adabu nono sana.
examples.en: That child has very good manners.
examples.sw: Mtoto yule ana adabu nzuri sana.

senses.definition_en: to depend on, to rely on
senses.definition_dg: Kumukuluphira mutu ama chitu na kuhadza kala chindakuterya.

examples.dg: Mchetu gungu asiye na mroromi wala msada wowosi nkumuadamira Mlungu bahi
examples.en: A widow who has no-one to look after her nor any help whatsoever depends on God alone
examples.sw: Mjane anategemea mtoto wake.

examples.dg: Mutu wa kuadimira
examples.en: A reliable person

senses.definition_dg: Kuiha atu edze kuswali, hasa kpwa sauti kulu.

examples.dg: Imamu nkuadhini kabla ya atu kuinjira msikitini
examples.en: The Imam calls people to prayer before they enter the mosque
examples.sw: Imamu anaadhini kabla ya wakati wa kuswali.

senses.definition_dg: Maneno ganagogombwa kuhusu mambo garigohendeka, ga kpweli ama ga kubuni.

examples.dg: Phrase: Adisi na ngano ikasirira hipho
examples.en: The story and lesson ends here
examples.sw: Mama alitusimulia hadithi nzuri usiku wa jana.

examples.dg: Vihani maadui kala ni asiru
examples.en: In the war the enemies were fierce

senses.definition_dg: Atu enye moyo mnono, enye huruma na upole kpwa atu anjina.

examples.dg: Nyumba iratu ina atu adzo-adzo
examples.en: That family has kind-hearted people
examples.sw: Familia ile ina watu wenye mioyo mizuri.

senses.definition_en: unslaughtered carcass (e.g. dead from disease, accident, etc.)
senses.definition_dg: Nyama ya mnyama ambaye akafwa ela kayatsindzhwa, phahi si halali.

examples.dg: Usirye nyama ya afu kpwa mana si nono.
examples.en: Don't eat the meat of an unslaughtered carcass because it is not good.
examples.sw: Usile nyama ya mfu kwa sababu si nzuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kutafuna chakurya kpwa meno kabla ya kumiza.

examples.dg: Mwana mdide nkuafuna chakurya pole pole.
examples.en: The small child chews food slowly.
examples.sw: Mtoto mdogo anatafuna chakula pole pole.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya mwiri wa mutu ichikala ikakala nono, kusikalawa.

examples.dg: Mwana achikala na afya nono, avyazi nkuhererwa
examples.en: If a child has good health, the parents are happy
examples.sw: Mtoto akiwa na afya njema, wazazi hufurahi.

senses.definition_dg: Jiwe ra samani sana ririro ngumu kuriko vitu vyosi, rinang'ala sana.

examples.dg: Binti ariphoolerwa waphahira pete ya ahadi.
examples.en: When the girl got married she received a diamond ring.
examples.sw: Binti alipoposwa alipata pete ya almasi.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ambaro mutu anarilavya kukala andahenda chitu fulani.

examples.dg: Baba waika ahadi kukala andamriphira mwanawe.
examples.en: Father made a promise that he would pay for his child.
examples.sw: Baba aliweka ahadi kuwa atamlipa mtoto wake.

sub_entries.definition_en: to make a promise, to keep a promise
sub_entries.definition_sw: kupa ahadi, kufanya agano, kuweka agano, kuthibitisha agano

senses.definition_dg: Kulavya neno kukala undahenda chitu fulani.

examples.dg: Mayo waahidi kumphira mwanawe nguo.
examples.en: Mother promised to buy her child clothes.
examples.sw: Mama aliahidi kumnunulia mtoto wake nguo.

senses.definition_en: them, they (used alone, often for emphasis)
senses.definition_dg: Neno rinahumirwa kuonyesa atu anaoambiwa ama anaogombwa, kpwa nguvu.

examples.dg: Aho ndio arigohenda hivyo.
examples.en: They are the ones who did that.
examples.sw: Wao ndio waliofanya hivyo.

senses.definition_en: to be torn, to burst, to tear
senses.definition_dg: Nguo ama chitu kuahuka, kutseka ama kubanduka.

examples.dg: Demu ra kare rikaahuka kpwa mana rikakala demu.
examples.en: The old garment tore because it was worn out.
examples.sw: Nguo ya zamani ilipasuka kwa sababu ilikuwa chakavu.

sub_entries.definition_sw: mana achihenda hivyo chira chiraka chindakpwanyuka, chiphya chirichane na cha kare, na hipho demu rindaahuka zaidi

sub_entries.definition_en: roho to go into shock after hearing bad news
sub_entries.definition_sw: kushtuka baada ya kusikia habari mbaya

senses.definition_en: to cut open, to tear, to split
senses.definition_dg: Kuahula chitu, kukpwanyula ama kutseka na mkpwono ama chisu.

examples.dg: Mayo waahula nazi kpwa chisu.
examples.en: Mother split open the coconut with a knife.
examples.sw: Mama alipasua nazi kwa kisu.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu fulani ambacho chinafwanana na chanjina ela tofauti na vitu vyanjina.

examples.dg: Kuna aina nyinji za nyama wa tsakani.
examples.en: There are many kinds of forest animals.
examples.sw: Kuna aina nyingi za wanyama wa msituni.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu ambacho chinahenda mutu aangalale kpwa mana ni cha ajabu sana.

examples.dg: Hiro rakala ni ajabu kulu kpwa atu osi.
examples.en: That was a great wonder to everyone.
examples.sw: Hilo lilikuwa ajabu kubwa kwa watu wote.

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa njira ya kushangaza sana, kupita chipimo.

examples.dg: Mutu mrefu ajabu
examples.en: An exceptionally tall person
examples.sw: Mtu yule ni mrefu sana kupita kiasi.

senses.definition_dg: Jambo baya ririrohendeka gafula, si kpwa makusudi, kama gari kugongana.

examples.dg: Ajali ya magari ikahendeka barabarani dzana.
examples.en: A car accident happened on the road yesterday.
examples.sw: Ajali ya magari ilitokea barabarani jana.

sub_entries.definition_en: ya for the sake of, because of

senses.definition_en: to suit, to be attractive, to be appropriate
senses.definition_dg: Kukala vinono, kupendeza kpwa matso ama kpwa masikiro.

examples.dg: Manenoge ganaajira
examples.en: His words are appropriate
examples.sw: Maneno yake yanapendeza sana.

senses.definition_dg: Moho kuaka, kutwa na joto kali sana.

examples.dg: Dzuwa rinaaka sana rero
examples.en: The sun is really hot today
examples.sw: Jua linawaka sana leo.

senses.definition_dg: Pesa ama vitu ambavyo mutu akavihifadhi kpwa wakati wa mbere.

examples.dg: Proverb: Akiba tayiola
examples.en: Savings do not rot
examples.sw: Akiba haiozi, kwa hivyo hifadhi pesa zako.

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinaonyesa chitu ni cha uwe, wa mutu mmwenga anayeambiwa.

examples.dg: Munda kala ni wako, phahi urime.
examples.en: The field was yours, so cultivate it.
examples.sw: Shamba lilikuwa lako, kwa hivyo ulime.

sub_entries.definition_en: ni wako. He is staying at your place
sub_entries.definition_sw: since your birth; the field was yours

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinaonyesa chitu ni cha iye, mutu mmwenga anayegombwa.

examples.dg: Vitu hivi ni vyakpwe, si vyangu.
examples.en: These things are hers, not mine.
examples.sw: Vitu hivi ni vyake, si vyangu.

senses.definition_dg: Kung'ala, kuika mwanga munji.

examples.dg: Nyenyezi zinaala usiku wa rero.
examples.en: The stars are shining brightly tonight.
examples.sw: Nyota zinang'ara usiku wa leo.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu chinachoonekana ambacho chinaonyesa mana fulani au kuphahikana na chitu chanjina.

examples.dg: Ika alama phatu hipho ili hukumbuke.
examples.en: Put a mark there so that we remember.
examples.sw: Weka alama mahali hapo ili tukumbuke.

senses.definition_dg: Siku ya inne ya wiki, kahi ya Arba na Ijumaa.

examples.dg: Sokoni kulu ni Alamisi hipha kpwehu.
examples.en: The big market day is Thursday here at our place.
examples.sw: Soko kubwa ni Alhamisi hapa kwetu.

senses.definition_dg: Pepho wa Chiarabu ambaye anaaminiwa ni mutu kpwa mila za kale.

examples.dg: Atu a kare kala nkuamini Albadili anaweza kuhendza na kutu mutu.
examples.en: People in the old days believed an Arabic spirit could help or harm a person.
examples.sw: Watu wa zamani waliamini pepo wa Kiarabu anaweza kusaidia au kumdhuru mtu.

senses.definition_dg: Kumuiha mutu edze phatu fulani, kama sherehe ama mkpwutano.

examples.dg: Hualika atu anji kpwa arusi yehu.
examples.en: We invited many people to our wedding.
examples.sw: Tuliwaalika watu wengi kwenye harusi yetu.

senses.definition_dg: Jiwe ra samani sana ririro ngumu kuriko vitu vyosi duniani, rinang'ala sana.

examples.dg: Alimasi ni jiwe ra samani kuriko mahwe gosi.
examples.en: A diamond is a more precious stone than all other stones.
examples.sw: Almasi ni jiwe la thamani kuliko mawe yote.

senses.definition_dg: Kuandza kurima munda kpwa wakati wa mwandzo wa mwaka wa kilimo.

examples.dg: Akurima andaaluka mwaka muhondo
examples.en: The farmers will begin the farming of the season of the long rains tomorrow
examples.sw: Wakulima wataanza kulima mwaka ujao.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu chinachohifadhiwa kama dhamana ya kukala mutu andahenda ariroahidi.

examples.dg: Waika nyumbare kama amana kabla ya kuphaha mkopo.
examples.en: He put his house as security before getting a loan.
examples.sw: Aliweka nyumba yake kama dhamana kabla ya kupata mkopo.

examples.dg: Rais anataka atu aishi kpwa amani
examples.en: The president wants the people to live in peace

senses.definition_dg: Kulavya maneno na kanwa, kugomba na mutu.

examples.dg: Waamba kala undakpwedza dzana, ela sikuonere
examples.en: You said that you would be coming yesterday, but I didn't see you
examples.sw: Ulisema utakuja jana, lakini sikukuona.

senses.definition_en: but really, certainly, possibly, as you know
senses.definition_dg: Neno rinahumirwa kuonyesa kushangaza ama kuthibitisha chitu, mana yache ni 'kpwa kpweli'.

examples.dg: Amba mi náphanda uratu munyu ambaho waniamba!
examples.en: But really I planted that salt that you told me!
examples.sw: Kwa hakika mimi nilipanda chumvi yote kama ulivyoniambia!

examples.dg: Waphanda munyu amba
examples.en: He planted salt you know
examples.sw: Kwa hakika mimi nilipanda chumvi yote kama ulivyoniambia!

senses.definition_dg: Kunyirikira photsi na ndani, kama nyoka ama mwana mdide.

examples.dg: Mwana mdide anaambala kpwenye nyumba yosi.
examples.en: The small child crawls all over the house.
examples.sw: Mtoto mdogo anatambaa nyumba nzima.

senses.definition_dg: Kulala ukagolosa mwiri wosi kama uwe mfu.

examples.dg: Mayo akaambalala mchekani
examples.en: The mother stretched herself out on the mat
examples.sw: Mama alijinyosha juu ya mkeka baada ya kufanya kazi nyingi.

equivalents_en: maneno na kugatenga na chandzo cha higo maneno. Kpwa mahumizi ga kawaida

senses.definition_en: maneno na kugatenga na chandzo cha higo maneno. Kpwa mahumizi ga kawaida, ku kabla ya voweli nkukala inahadzwa kpw, lakini
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuunganisha rinaonyesa njira ambayo chitu chinahendwa.

examples.dg: Nákumanya ambavyo urigohenda kazi iyo.
examples.en: I know how you did that work.
examples.sw: Nafahamu jinsi ulivyofanya kazi hiyo.

senses.definition_en: siyo voweli, andika m tu, kpwa mfwano: mlole. Ichikala dzina rikaundwa kula kpwa chihendo, neno hiro kpwaandza na mu (muandishi, muaminifu n.k.) isiphokala maneno garigo na silabi mbiri bahi, mfwano
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuunganisha rinahumirwa kuonyesa chitu ambacho kinagombwa.

examples.dg: Nyumba ambayo nkudzengbwa ni kulu sana.
examples.en: The house which is being built is very big.
examples.sw: Nyumba ambayo inajengwa ni kubwa sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kugomba na mutu ukimupha habari ama ujumbe.

examples.dg: Wamuambira Sudi kala andakpwedza muhondo
examples.en: She told Sudi that she would come tomorrow
examples.sw: Alimwambia Sudi kuwa atakuja mwaka ujao.

senses.definition_en: to ascend, to climb, to go up (especially a mountain or hill)
senses.definition_dg: Kuphiya dzulu, hasa mwango ama murimu.

examples.dg: Hwaambuka mwango hura kpwa saa mbiri.
examples.en: We climbed that hill in two hours.
examples.sw: Tulipanda mlima ule kwa masaa mawili.

senses.definition_dg: Kueneza ukongo kula kpwa mutu mmwenga kuphiya kpwa mutu wanjina.

examples.dg: Ukongo uhu unaambukiza kpwa urahisi.
examples.en: This disease spreads easily.
examples.sw: Ugonjwa huu unaambukiza kwa urahisi.

senses.definition_dg: Kukubali kukala chitu ni cha kpweli kpwa moyoni.

examples.dg: Náamini kala undaniterya.
examples.en: I believe that you will help me.
examples.sw: Naamini kuwa utanisaidia.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu ambaye anaweza kukuluphirwa, mutu wa kpweli.

examples.dg: Mtumishi iye ni mutu aminifu sana.
examples.en: That servant is a very trustworthy person.
examples.sw: Mtumishi yule ni mtu mwaminifu sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala ni mutu ambaye anaweza kukuluphirwa na atu anjina.

examples.dg: Mutu ariye na adabu nono nkuaminika na atu osi.
examples.en: A person with good manners is trusted by everyone.
examples.sw: Mtu mwenye adabu nzuri anaaminika na watu wote.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu ariye mkpwulu wa jeshi ama wa kutawala atu.

examples.dg: Amiri wa jeshi walavya amuri kpwa asikari.
examples.en: The army commander gave orders to the soldiers.
examples.sw: Amiri wa jeshi alitoa amri kwa askari.

senses.definition_dg: Kuandza kuhenda chitu tsona bada ya kukala ukaricha.

examples.dg: Akaamukpwa shida tsona
examples.en: His problems have started again
examples.sw: Matatizo yalianza tena baada ya miezi michache.

senses.definition_dg: Kulavya uamuzi wa haki kuhusu dzambo, kama kadhi ama muamuli.

examples.dg: Kadhi waamula shauri ra hara atu airi.
examples.en: The judge decided the case of those two people.
examples.sw: Kadhi alihukumu shauri la watu wale wawili.

senses.definition_dg: Uamuzi ambao unalaviwa ni muamuli ama kadhi bada ya kusikiriza shauri.

examples.dg: Amulo wa kadhi wahendesa atu anji akale na furaha.
examples.en: The judge's ruling made many people happy.
examples.sw: Hukumu ya kadhi iliwafanya watu wengi wawe na furaha.

senses.definition_dg: Kutsagula njira moja kahi ya njira nyinji, kuika uamuzi.

examples.dg: Hwaamuwa kuphiya Mombasa muhondo.
examples.en: We decided to go to Mombasa next year.
examples.sw: Tuliamua kwenda Mombasa mwaka ujao.

senses.definition_dg: Mwana kunyonya maziya ga nine kpwa kanwa.

examples.dg: Mwana mdide nkuamwa maziya ga nine
examples.en: A young child sucks his mother's milk
examples.sw: Mtoto mdogo ananyonya maziwa ya mama yake.

senses.definition_dg: Kumupha mwana maziya ga nine, kumunyonyesha.

examples.dg: Mayo wamwamwisa mwanawe
examples.en: The mother breastfed her child
examples.sw: Mama alimnyonyesha mtoto wake kabla ya kulala.

senses.definition_en: (of darkness) to spread, to increase, to fall
senses.definition_dg: Jiza kuenea na kuongezeka, kuandza kukala jiza.

examples.dg: Hipha ni kure na midzi, na jiza rinaanda
examples.en: Here it is far from human habitation, and darkness is falling
examples.sw: Mahali hapa ni mbali na kijiji, na giza linaingia.

senses.definition_dg: Kuangamiza, kuharibu chitu hadi chisiwe tsona.

examples.dg: Pharika kali ikaandaa mimea yosi mundani.
examples.en: The severe storm destroyed all the crops in the field.
examples.sw: Dhoruba kali iliharibu mimea yote shambani.

senses.definition_en: to prepare food, to host (e.g. a football match)
senses.definition_dg: Kutayarisha chakurya ama chitu chanjina, ama kuendesha sherehe.

examples.dg: Ano mayo anaandaa chakurya
examples.en: The women are preparing food
examples.sw: Wanawake wanaandaa chakula cha jioni.

examples.dg: Afrika Kusini indaandaa Kombe ra Duniya mwaka wa 2010
examples.en: South Africa will host the World Cup in 2010
examples.sw: Wanawake wanaandaa chakula cha jioni.

senses.definition_dg: Nambari sita kpwa luga ya kare ya Chidigo.

examples.dg: Akare kala nkuamba andahu badala ya sita.
examples.en: The elders used to say 'andahu' instead of six.
examples.sw: Wazee walikuwa wanasema 'andahu' badala ya sita.

senses.definition_dg: Kutayarishira mutu chitu, kumuandaa mutu chakurya au chochosi.

examples.dg: Mayo anaandaliya baba chakurya
examples.en: Mother is preparing food for father
examples.sw: Mama anaandalia baba chakula.

equivalents_en: serve food (to take food from the kitchen to the guests)

senses.definition_en: to serve food (to take food from the kitchen to the guests)
senses.definition_dg: Kuphirika chakurya kula dzikoni kuphiya kpwa ajeni ama atu anaohesha.

examples.dg: Binti waandaza chakurya kpwa ajeni ariyekpwedza.
examples.en: The girl served food to the guest who came.
examples.sw: Binti aliandaa chakula kwa mgeni aliyekuja.

senses.definition_dg: Kuika maneno kpwa kalamu dzulu ya karatasi ama chitu chanjina.

examples.dg: Mwanafundzi nkuandika barua kpwa nine.
examples.en: The student is writing a letter to his mother.
examples.sw: Mwanafunzi anaandika barua kwa mama yake.

examples.dg: Mrisa wa kuandikpwa nkuchimbira, kpwa vira mang'ondzi sigo gakpwe wala kanago utsungu
examples.en: A hired shepherd runs away, since the sheep are not his own and he doesn't care about them

senses.definition_dg: Kumuandikira mutu barua ama ujumbe.

examples.dg: Námuandikira mwenehu barua kula Mombasa.
examples.en: I wrote a letter to my sibling from Mombasa.
examples.sw: Nilimwandikia ndugu yangu barua kutoka Mombasa.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu ambacho kala chikagomezwa kuvunduka na kudzisengeza.

examples.dg: Karatasi ya ukutani ikaanduka kpwa sababu ya uvungo.
examples.en: The paper on the wall came unstuck because of moisture.
examples.sw: Karatasi ya ukutani ilibambuka kwa sababu ya unyevu.

examples.dg: Nkaandukpwa minyere nchiphoona pepho
examples.en: My hair stood on end when I saw the spirit

senses.definition_en: to unstick, to peel something off
senses.definition_dg: Kuphula chitu chirichogomezwa, kukpwanyula chitu.

examples.dg: Mwana waandula karatasi kula ukutani.
examples.en: The child peeled off the paper from the wall.
examples.sw: Mtoto aliambua karatasi kutoka ukutani.

senses.definition_dg: Kuandza kuhenda chitu, kuika mwandzo wa kazi ama dzambo.

examples.dg: N'ndaandza kazi yanjina mwezi wedzao
examples.en: I will begin another job next month
examples.sw: Nitaanza kazi nyingine mwezi ujao.

senses.definition_en: to begin, to start up (an enterprise or event)
senses.definition_dg: Kuanzisha chitu chiphya, kama bishara ama shirika.

examples.dg: N'ndaandzisha bishara nchiphaha pesa
examples.en: I will start up a business if I get the money
examples.sw: Nitaanzisha biashara nitakapopata pesa.

senses.definition_dg: Kunyendeka kpwa maringo, kutsapa kpwa kuvwala.

examples.dg: Barobaro nkuandzula barabarani kpwa maringo.
examples.en: The young man struts along the road pompously.
examples.sw: Kijana anatembea barabarani kwa maringo.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhumira utsai kumuhendera mutu uyi.

examples.dg: Mwanga kaziye ni kuanga
examples.en: The wizard's work is to bewitch people
examples.sw: Mchawi kazi yake ni kuanga watu.

senses.definition_en: to do something against custom (e.g. to walk naked)
senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda chitu ambacho ni kinyume na mila, kama kunyendeka chitsaha.

examples.dg: Usiange, kpwa mana atu andakumanya vibaya.
examples.en: Don't act against custom, because people will think badly of you.
examples.sw: Usiende kinyume cha mila, kwa sababu watu watakuona vibaya.

senses.definition_en: to wander around, to walk about
senses.definition_dg: Kunyendeka hiku na hiku bila kazi, kuzunguluka bila lengo.

examples.dg: Iye anaangaika, simanya anaendzani
examples.en: He is wandering around, I don't know what he's looking for
examples.sw: Yeye anaangaika, sijui anatafuta nini.

senses.definition_dg: Kushangala sana kpwa kukala hukuona chitu cha aina iyo kabla.

examples.dg: Atu osi akaangalala kpwa hiro arigohenda.
examples.en: Everyone marveled at what he did.
examples.sw: Watu wote walistaajabu kwa alilofanya.

senses.definition_dg: Kupotea, kutsamuka na kusionekana tsona.

examples.dg: Mbuzi yehu ikaangamika tsakani usiku wa dzana.
examples.en: Our goat got lost in the forest last night.
examples.sw: Mbuzi wetu alipotea msituni usiku wa jana.

senses.definition_dg: Kupoteza chitu ambacho kala unacho.

examples.dg: Mwanajuma waangamiza rumu rangu
examples.en: Mwanajuma has lost my knife
examples.sw: Mtoto wa Juma alipoteza ufunguo wangu.

senses.definition_dg: Kupoteza chitu ambacho kala unacho.

examples.dg: Mwanajuma waangamiza rumu rangu.
examples.en: Juma's child lost my key.
examples.sw: Mtoto wa Juma alipoteza ufunguo wangu.

senses.definition_dg: Kuharibu chitu hadi chisiwe na mana tsona.

examples.dg: Mvula kulu ikaangamiza mimea yosi mundani.
examples.en: The heavy rain destroyed all the crops in the field.
examples.sw: Mvua kubwa iliharibu mimea yote shambani.

senses.definition_dg: Kuona chitu ambacho si cha kawaida, kama pepho ama mzimu.

examples.dg: Achimu waangira usiku wa kucha.
examples.en: The elder saw an apparition during the night.
examples.sw: Mzee aliona kitu cha ajabu usiku kucha.

senses.definition_dg: Kuona mambo ga ajabu ambago si ga kawaida, kama pepho ama roho.

examples.dg: Dzana usiku náangirwa, náona mutu anatuluka kaburini
examples.en: Last night I saw a ghost, I saw a person coming out of a grave
examples.sw: Usiku wa jana niliona mambo ya ajabu, niliona mtu anatoka kaburini.

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinaonyesa chitu ni changu, cha mutu anayegomba.

examples.dg: Chitabu hichi ni changu, si chakpwe.
examples.en: This book is mine, not his.
examples.sw: Kitabu hiki ni changu, si chake.

equivalents_en: (ano ani) who? nani? Ni ani aphiyaye? Who is going? Ni ano ani aphiyao? Who are going?

senses.definition_en: (ano ani) who? nani? Ni ani aphiyaye? Who is going? Ni ano ani aphiyao? Who are going?
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuuza kuhusu mutu ambaye humanyikana, mana yache ni 'yupi'.

examples.dg: Ni ani aphiyaye phatu hipho?
examples.en: Who is going to that place?
examples.sw: Ni nani anayekwenda mahali hapo?

equivalents_en: which? gani? Ni maneno gani gano uchigohenda? What is this you have done? U ani we? Who are you

senses.definition_en: which? gani? Ni maneno gani gano uchigohenda? What is this you have done? U ani we? Who are you
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuuza kuhusu mutu ambaye humanyikana, mana yache ni 'yupi'.

examples.dg: Ni ani aphiyaye phatu hipho?
examples.en: Who is going to that place?
examples.sw: Ni nani anayekwenda mahali hapo?

senses.definition_dg: Kuika chitu dzuwani ili chiume, kama nguwo ama mimea.

examples.dg: Mayo anaanika nguwo
examples.en: Mother is putting out the clothes to dry
examples.sw: Mama anaanika nguo juani.

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinaonyesa chitu ambacho si cha hakika, pengine.

examples.dg: Anji andakpwedza muhondo, simanya bado.
examples.en: Perhaps he will come next year, I don't know yet.
examples.sw: Pengine atakuja mwaka ujao, sijui bado.

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinaonyesa vitu vya nyinji, si vya aina moja bahi, ela vya aina tofauti-tofauti.

examples.dg: Maneno ganjina
examples.en: Some words./Other words
examples.sw: Maneno mengine yatazungumzwa mwaka ujao.

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinahumirwa kuonyesa kundi ra atu, kama ano mayo au ano baba.

examples.dg: Ano mayo anakutana chikundini
examples.en: The womenfolk are meeting at the meeting place
examples.sw: Wanawake wanakutana shambani.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu mutu anaphoishi ama nambari ya nyumba yache ama sanduku ra barua.

examples.dg: Nipha anuwaniyyo ili nikuandikire barua.
examples.en: Give me your address so that I can write you a letter.
examples.sw: Nipe anwani yako ili nikuandikie barua.

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinaonyesa chitu ni cha aho, cha atu ambao anagombwa.

examples.dg: Nyumba yao ni kulu kuriko yehu.
examples.en: Their house is bigger than ours.
examples.sw: Nyumba yao ni kubwa kuliko yetu.

senses.definition_dg: Kulavya ahadi kpwa nguvu sana, kuika kiapo.

examples.dg: Waapa kukala kagomba handzo.
examples.en: He swore that he did not tell a lie.
examples.sw: Aliapa kuwa hakusema uongo.

senses.definition_dg: Kumupha mutu chitu na kutarajiya achichiuyize, kukopesha.

examples.dg: Námuaphasa jirani pesa kidogo.
examples.en: I lent my neighbor a little money.
examples.sw: Nilimkopesha jirani pesa kidogo.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphaha chitu kula kpwa mutu wanjina na kutarajiya kuchiuyiza.

examples.dg: Námuaphasa jirani sufuria yache.
examples.en: I borrowed a cooking pot from my neighbor.
examples.sw: Niliazima sufuria kutoka kwa jirani.

examples.dg: Sina pesa za kutosha za kugula vitu dukani, nahenda aphasa
examples.en: I don't have enough money to buy things in the shop, I am buying on credit

senses.definition_dg: Chakurya kutuluka kula ndanini kpwa njira ya kanwa, kutaphika.

examples.dg: Mwana waaphika ariphokala mutu wa basi.
examples.en: The child vomited when he was in the bus.
examples.sw: Mtoto alitapika alipokuwa ndani ya basi.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu ambaye ni ndugu mwanaume wa mayo, ndugumwe wa kike wa baba.

examples.dg: Aphu wangu ananiterya sana kpwa masomo gangu.
examples.en: My maternal uncle helps me a lot with my studies.
examples.sw: Mjomba wangu ananisaidia sana na masomo yangu.

senses.definition_dg: Kugomba maneno mabaya kuhusu mutu na kutaraji mambo mabaya gamphike.

examples.dg: Mzehe wamuapiza mwanawe ariyemkosera.
examples.en: The elder cursed his child who wronged him.
examples.sw: Mzee alimlaani mtoto wake aliyemkosea.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphiya photsi, kushuka kula phatu pha dzulu kuphiya photsi.

examples.dg: Hwaara mwango hura kpwa pole pole.
examples.en: We descended that hill slowly.
examples.sw: Tulishuka mlima ule pole pole.

senses.definition_dg: Kung'ala, kuika mwanga munji, kunakpwa kutwa.

examples.dg: Dzuwa rinaara
examples.en: The sun is shining
examples.sw: Jua linang'aa mapema sana leo.

senses.definition_dg: Photsi pha dunia ambapho atu anaishi na kurima.

examples.dg: Aridhi ya phatu hipho ni nono kpwa urimi.
examples.en: The land of that place is good for farming.
examples.sw: Ardhi ya mahali hapo ni nzuri kwa kilimo.

senses.definition_dg: Chimoja cha vitu vya kuandika ambavyo vinahendza maneno, kama a, b, ch.

examples.dg: Mwanafundzi nkudzifundza arufu za Chidigo.
examples.en: The student is learning the Digo alphabet letters.
examples.sw: Mwanafunzi anajifunza herufi za Kidigo.

senses.definition_dg: Sherehe ya kuolana kahi ya mchetu na mlume.

examples.dg: Arusi ya mwenehu ikala nono sana.
examples.en: My sibling's wedding was very beautiful.
examples.sw: Harusi ya ndugu yangu ilikuwa nzuri sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kuika moho kpwa chitu ili chiake, kama taa ama kuni.

examples.dg: Baba waasa taa kpwa mana kala ni jiza.
examples.en: Father lit the lamp because it was dark.
examples.sw: Baba aliwasha taa kwa sababu kulikuwa giza.

senses.definition_en: to light, to kindle, to set fire to
senses.definition_dg: Kuika moho kpwa chitu ili chiake, kama taa ama kuni.

examples.dg: Kuasa taa
examples.en: To light a lamp
examples.sw: Baba aliwasha taa kwa sababu kulikuwa giza.

examples.dg: Kuasa mashine
examples.en: To start a machine
examples.sw: Baba aliwasha taa kwa sababu kulikuwa giza.

equivalents_en: perform a traditional act of reconciliation between a parent and a child

senses.definition_en: to perform a traditional act of reconciliation between a parent and a child, usually by drinking out of the same cup. This happens if a parent has cursed their child and then decides to remove the curse. Kufanya mambo fulani ili kuondoa laana mzazi aliyompa mwanawe
senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda mila ya kuondosa lana ambayo mzazi wamuika mwanawe, kpwa kunwa kpwa kikombe chimwenga.

examples.dg: Mzehe waasa mwanawe bada ya kala akimuapiza.
examples.en: The elder performed the reconciliation ritual with his child after having cursed him.
examples.sw: Mzee alifanya ibada ya kuondoa laana kwa mtoto wake baada ya kumlaani.

equivalents_en: pray and offer sacrifices (usually a black cow

senses.definition_en: to pray and offer sacrifices (usually a black cow, goat or chicken) for
senses.definition_dg: Kuswali na kulavya sadaka, hasa ng'ombe, mbuzi, ama kuku, kpwa sababu ya kuomba baraka.

examples.dg: Akare kala nkuasa kpwa kulavya sadaka ya mbuzi.
examples.en: The elders used to pray by offering a goat sacrifice.
examples.sw: Wazee walikuwa wanasali kwa kutoa sadaka ya mbuzi.

sub_entries.definition_en: rains, harvest, catches of fish, etc
sub_entries.definition_sw: kuomba na kutoa sadaka (kwa kawaida ng'ombe, mbuzi ama kuku mweusi) ili kupata mvua, mavuno mazuri, n.k

examples.dg: Proverb: Mlamba asali kalamba lumwenga
examples.en: One who licks honey doesn't just lick once

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinahumirwa kuonyesa shukurani kpwa mutu ariyekuhendera dzambo dzinono.

examples.dg: Asanta sana bwana
examples.en: Thank you very much sir
examples.sw: Asante sana bwana kwa msaada wako.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kukatala kpwa upole, kuamba 'sitaki'.

examples.dg: Asanta, sitaki chai kpwa vivi.
examples.en: No thanks, I don't want tea right now.
examples.sw: Asante, sitaki chai kwa sasa.

examples.dg: Asanta
examples.en: Shall I make you some tea?

senses.definition_dg: Mutu anayerinda ama anayehumika jeshini, kama porisi ama mulinzi.

examples.dg: Nyumba nyinji za Nairobi zinarindwa ni asikari
examples.en: Many houses in Nairobi are guarded by watchmen
examples.sw: Nyumba nyingi za Nairobi zinalindwa na askari.

senses.definition_dg: Mwandzo wa chitu, phatu ambacho chitu chinatuluka ama chandzoche.

examples.dg: Asiliye ni kula pwani ya Kenya.
examples.en: His origin is from the coast of Kenya.
examples.sw: Asili yake ni kutoka pwani ya Kenya.

senses.definition_dg: Kupunguza kucha kpwa chisu ama chitu cha kutsekea.

examples.dg: Binti nkuata kucha zache kpwa care.
examples.en: The girl is trimming her nails carefully.
examples.sw: Binti anapunguza kucha zake kwa uangalifu.

senses.definition_dg: Kutulusa mwiba ama chitu chirichoinjira mwirini.

examples.dg: Mayo waata mwiba kula maguluni mwa mwanawe.
examples.en: Mother extracted the thorn from her child's foot.
examples.sw: Mama alitoa mwiba kutoka mguuni mwa mtoto wake.

senses.definition_dg: Kuricha mcheo ama mlumeo, kuachana.

examples.dg: Alii waata mchewe dzuzi
examples.en: Alii divorced his wife the other day
examples.sw: Ali alimtaliki mkewe baada ya miaka miwili.

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinaonyesa kukala habari hiyo si ya kpweli au ni ya kushangaza.

examples.dg: Mnaamba ati mu matajiri na muna chila chitu, hata tamuna mutsowacho!
examples.en: You say, apparently, that you are rich and you have everything, even that you have no needs!
examples.sw: Mnasema ati nyinyi ni matajiri na mna kila kitu!

examples.dg: "Kpwa utu wani yuno anagomba vino?
examples.en: Anakufuru Mlungu ati!" "Why is this fellow talking in this way?
examples.sw: Mnasema ati nyinyi ni matajiri na mna kila kitu!

examples.dg: Siyo vinono kunihendera kazi bure ati kpwa sababu u muwangu
examples.en: It is not good for you to work for me for nothing, even if you are my nephew

senses.definition_dg: Phatu phenye ncha kali, kama phatu pha dzulu pha sindano ama mkuki.

examples.dg: Atsa ya sindano ni kali sana, jihadhari.
examples.en: The point of the needle is very sharp, be careful.
examples.sw: Ncha ya sindano ni kali sana, jihadhari.

examples.dg: Unamendza kurya ndizi au machungbwa?
examples.en: Would you like to eat a banana or an orange?

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinahumirwa kpwa kulinganisha vitu viiri, mana yache ni 'dza' ama 'kama'.

examples.dg: Násikira avi kuna nyama anapanda-panda hivi
examples.en: It sounded like there was an animal climbing around
examples.sw: Nilisikia kama kuna mnyama anapanda-panda hivi.

senses.definition_en: before, at first, in the beginning
senses.definition_dg: Mwandzo wa wakati, kabla ya mambo ganjina gosi.

examples.dg: Awali nákpwedza kpwenu, halafu nchiphiya Mombasa
examples.en: First I came to your place, then I went to Mombasa
examples.sw: Kwanza nilikuja kwenu, halafu nikaenda Mombasa.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhendza ngozi au chitu chanjina chikale chinauma na kuasha.

examples.dg: Mafuha gano ganaawisa ngozi sana.
examples.en: This oil irritates the skin a lot.
examples.sw: Mafuta haya yanawasha ngozi sana.

equivalents_en: bafuta burning feeling in the mouth

senses.definition_en: bafuta burning feeling in the mouth
senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kuashwa kpwa kanwa kpwa sababu ya chitu chenye ukali.

examples.dg: Piripiri nyinji zinakala kuawiwa kanwani.
examples.en: Too much pepper causes a burning feeling in the mouth.
examples.sw: Pilipili nyingi husababisha kuwasha mdomoni.

senses.definition_dg: Ngozi kuasha na kuhisi ukali, kutaka kuhendza.

examples.dg: Uchishuhirwa ni nyuchi undaawiwa
examples.en: When you are stung by bees you will itch
examples.sw: Ukiumwa na nyuki utawashwa.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kpwandza rinaonyesa atu a uganani, ayangu, ayao.

examples.dg: Ayache akamterya ariphokala mutu wa shida.
examples.en: His companions helped him when he was in trouble.
examples.sw: Wenzake walimsaidia alipokuwa na shida.

senses.definition_dg: Kugomba maneno ambago tagana mana, kupayuka.

examples.dg: Mzehe nkuayuka maneno ambago tagagomezeka.
examples.en: The old man is babbling words that don't make sense.
examples.sw: Mzee anapayuka maneno ambayo hayaeleweki.

senses.definition_dg: Kutamani chitu sana moyoni, kulonda kuphaha chitu.

examples.dg: Mwana nkuaza kupata nguo nono.
examples.en: The child desires to get nice clothes.
examples.sw: Mtoto anatamani kupata nguo nzuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kufikiri sana na kpwa undani kuhusu dzambo fulani.

examples.dg: Baba nkuaza-aza kuhusu njira ya kuliphira masomo ga mwanawe.
examples.en: Father is pondering about how to pay for his child's education.
examples.sw: Baba anafikiri sana kuhusu jinsi ya kulipa masomo ya mtoto wake.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya maazo.

examples.dg: Maazo gache ni manono sana.
examples.en: His thoughts are very good.
examples.sw: Mawazo yake ni mazuri sana.
